text.title: kb-symbol-index-fresh-tags Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for kb-symbol-index-fresh-tags as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Adding the index to .gitignore and rebuilding it in each CI run.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Defeats offline / sandboxed agent runtimes (no network or LSP server) and removes the diff signal that catches index-affecting refactors during code review.

failure-mode.description: Letting each agent pick its own search tool ad-hoc per task.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Behaviour becomes non-reproducible across agent kinds (Claude Code vs Cursor vs Codex), and context cost explodes on the largest repos exactly when it matters most.
